intent: Fixed aspect-ratio container for images, videos, maps, and other media that must maintain proportions.

blacklist.description: Do not override overflow and positioning

aiPrompt: Use AspectRatio from @/components/base whenever an image / video / iframe / chart needs to keep its proportions while the container resizes. Pass `ratio` as a number (width ÷ height). Don't reach for `aspect-[16/9]` arbitrary Tailwind on a raw div — it works but loses the design-system anchor.

examples.title: 16:9 video / hero image
1:1 square thumbnail
4:3 embedded iframe
examples.snippet:
<AspectRatio ratio={4 / 3}>
  <iframe src={url} className="h-full w-full rounded-md border" />
</AspectRatio>
